explorers.notes: Public explorer candidate; archive verification used RPC rather than explorer scrape.

sources.notes: Degen Chain JSON-RPC used for eth_chainId, eth_getCode, eth_call getters, and eth_getLogs scans.
Auction house event ABI and WOOF vault allocation source files.

notes: Mission 2 auction data was recovered from Degen Chain logs.
Auction amounts are 18-decimal WDEGEN/DEGEN-denominated raw integers. Display values are generated from exact integer strings.
